verses.text: Lifting his eyes to God enthroned in heaven, he waits 'as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters,' until God shows mercy. Patient dependence marks him. The servant of God watches His hand, ready and waiting for grace.

Lifting his eyes to God enthroned in heaven, he waits 'as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters,' until God shows mercy. Patient dependence marks him. The servant of God watches His hand, ready and waiting for grace.

'Have mercy upon us, O LORD,' he prays, for they are 'filled with contempt' and the scorn of the proud. He brings their reproach to God. When men despise the godly, they may pour out that scorn before the throne of mercy.
